channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Senator Karen Nyamu Addresses Controversy Over Comments About Grade 10 Student Visiting Senate
item.description: Nominated Senator Karen Nyamu has responded following public criticism over comments she made regarding a Grade 10 student who visited the Senate under the School Volunteer Scheme. The learner, from B...

item.title: ADC Raises Concern Over Alleged Pressure on Justice Nwite to Withdraw from Case
item.description: The African Democratic Congress (ADC) don raise alarm say some agents wey dey linked to the Federal Government dey try interfere for one ongoing court matter involving Nafiu Bala Gombe. According to s...

item.title: U.S. and Iran Exchange Missiles and Drones Near Strait of Hormuz, Ceasefire Under Strain
item.description: The United States and Iran have exchanged fire in the Persian Gulf, escalating tensions around the strategically vital Strait of Hormuz even as a fragile ceasefire agreement remains technically in eff...

item.title: US Military Responds to Iranian Attacks with Targeted Strikes Amid Ongoing Tensions
item.description: US forces carried out targeted strikes on Iranian military facilities responsible for multiple missile, drone, and small boat attacks on American warships transiting the Strait of Hormuz, according to...

item.title: Tennessee Republicans adopt new congressional map targeting Black‑majority district after Supreme Court ruling
item.description: Tennessee’s Republican‑controlled legislature has passed a new congressional map that dismantles the state’s lone majority‑Black district, centered in Memphis, in what critics call a partisan gerryman...

item.title: New York Budget Still Not Final Despite Hochul's Claim of Deal
item.description: New York Governor Kathy Hochul announced on Thursday morning that she had reached a budget agreement, but Assembly Speaker Carl Heastie quickly contradicted her, stating that nothing is actually final...

item.title: Iran establishes agency to manage Strait of Hormuz shipping while reviewing U.S. peace negotiations
item.description: Iran has announced the creation of a new governmental agency tasked with controlling shipping operations in the strategically vital Strait of Hormuz, a key maritime chokepoint for global oil transport...

item.title: Chinese automakers expand globally with locally designed vehicles
item.description: Chinese car manufacturers are moving beyond merely exporting domestic models with minor tweaks and are now designing vehicles specifically for overseas markets. This shift is part of a broader 'Going ...

item.title: PNP orders faster passage of relief convoys for Mayon evacuees
item.description: The Philippine National Police (PNP) has directed its local commanders to avoid unnecessary inspections of relief convoys to ensure faster delivery of aid to communities affected by the ongoing erupti...

item.title: Family of Jake Hall mourns the death of the Towie star at 35
item.description: Jake Hall, known for his role in the reality television series Towie, has tragically passed away at the age of 35. The mother of his child has spoken publicly about the devastating impact of his death...

item.title: Inter Miami CF Partners with IM8 for Exclusive Health Supplement Integration
item.description: Prenetics Global Limited, the parent company of the premium health and longevity brand IM8 co-founded by David Beckham, has announced a multi-year partnership with Major League Soccer club Inter Miami...

item.title: Bayan group criticizes US missile firing in Balikatan exercises for endangering communities
item.description: The Eastern Visayas chapter of militant group Bagong Alyansang Makabayan (Bayan) has strongly condemned the recent firing of a US Typhon mid-range missile system during the annual Philippines-US Balik...

item.title: Canadian taxpayers face rising federal debt interest costs
item.description: The Canadian Taxpayers Federation (CTF) has raised concerns about the growing cost of servicing federal debt, citing the latest report from the Parliamentary Budget Officer (PBO). According to the PBO...

item.title: Charly Boy Explains Why He Confronted Rochas Okorocha at His Father’s Burial
item.description: Veteran Nigerian entertainer Charles Oputa, popularly known as Charly Boy, has once again spoken about the heated confrontation between him and former Imo State Governor Rochas Okorocha during his fat...

item.title: Delhi Government to Revamp Kalindi Kunj Barrage and Reduce Pollution in Yamuna
item.description: The Delhi government has announced plans to revamp the Kalindi Kunj barrage in order to address the persistent issue of froth in the Yamuna river. Water Minister Parvesh Sahib Singh, along with expert...

item.title: Rajasthan Former Minister Mahesh Joshi Taken Into Custody Over Jal Jeevan Mission Fund Misappropriation
item.description: The Rajasthan Anti-Corruption Bureau (ACB) on Thursday arrested Mahesh Joshi, a senior Congress leader and former Public Health Engineering Minister of the state, in connection with alleged misappropr...

item.title: A year after Operation Sindoor, Uri's children continue to suffer from shelling trauma
item.description: One year following Operation Sindoor, the children in Uri are still grappling with the traumatic aftermath of the conflict. Many youngsters have physical scars from shelling, while psychological wound...

item.title: Mother dies protecting her child in Bristol home explosion
item.description: Joanne Shaw, aged 35, tragically lost her life in a deliberate home explosion in Frenchay, Bristol, on Sunday. Police confirmed that the blast, which also claimed the life of her ex-partner, Ryan Kell...

item.title: Kenya Power Employee Charged with Soliciting Bribe Over Electricity Pole Issue in Vihiga
item.description: A Kenya Power and Lighting Company (KPLC) employee, Kennedy Wambani Oduor, has been arrested by the Ethics and Anti-Corruption Commission (EACC) for allegedly soliciting a KSh 20,000 bribe from God's ...

item.title: Primaris REIT's New CIO Acquires Stake in the REIT
item.description: Since the beginning of the year, three insiders of Primaris REIT (PMZ.UN-T) have collectively invested $606,093 in purchasing units on the public market. A total of 33,055 units were acquired at an av...
